question_text: Which statement correctly describes how gravitational force changes with distance between two objects?

options.label: A
options.text: Gravitational force increases as objects move further apart

options.label: B
options.text: Gravitational force decreases as the distance between objects increases

options.label: C
options.text: Gravitational force stays exactly the same no matter the distance

options.label: D
options.text: Gravitational force only exists when objects are touching

explanation: Gravitational force is a force that acts at a distance. As objects move further apart, the gravitational force between them decreases, following an inverse relationship with distance.
